text:
**Epic #202** — Adopt Trellis for deterministic reconciliation of subscriptions, status & hook context

| # | Slice | Thrust |
|---|-------|--------|
| [#203](https://github.com/pablof7z/tenex-edge/issues/203) | Audit & map surfaces to Trellis primitives | `refactor:audit` — the input-set map, no behavior change |
| [#204](https://github.com/pablof7z/tenex-edge/issues/204) | Shadow-mode the subscription planner | the beachhead: plan-vs-`ensure_subscription` diff on live traffic |
| [#205](https://github.com/pablof7z/tenex-edge/issues/205) | Resurrect subscription teardown | fixes the documented tens-of-GB leak; kills the dead `close_subs`/`compact` |
| [#206](https://github.com/pablof7z/tenex-edge/issues/206) | 30315 status as derived node + frame | collapses 5 triggers/2 timers; emit only on change |
| [#207](https://github.com/pablof7z/tenex-edge/issues/207) | Deterministic status teardown | status outliving dead sessions + stale `h`-tags |
| [#208](https://github.com/pablof7z/tenex-edge/issues/208) | Hook snapshot as derived node | replaces the divergent hand-rolled `turn_start_audit` |
| [#209](https://github.com/pablof7z/tenex-edge/issues/209) | Equivalence oracle & characterization harness | `assert_incremental_equals_full` as a CI gate |
| [#210](https://github.com/pablof7z/tenex-edge/issues/210) | **Retrospective instrumentation** | `tenex-edge explain <handle>` + an `llm_calls` ledger — your "what was fed to the LLM?" question | [...] ## Summary — [Epic #202](https://github.com/pablof7z/tenex-edge/issues/202)

**Adopt Trellis for deterministic reconciliation of subscriptions, status & hook context**, in `pablof7z/tenex-edge`. Shadow-mode adoption, sequenced lowest-friction-first.

| # | Slice | What it does |
|---|-------|-------------|
| [#203](https://github.com/pablof7z/tenex-edge/issues/203) | Audit & input-set map | Map the three surfaces to Trellis primitives; no behavior change |
| [#204](https://github.com/pablof7z/tenex-edge/issues/204) | Shadow the subscription planner | The beachhead: plan-vs-`ensure_subscription` diff on live traffic |
| [#205](https://github.com/pablof7z/tenex-edge/issues/205) | Resurrect subscription teardown | Fixes the documented tens-of-GB leak; kills dead `close_subs`/`compact` |
| [#206](https://github.com/pablof7z/tenex-edge/issues/206) | 30315 status as derived node + frame | Collapses 5 triggers / 2 timers; publish only on change |
| [#207](https://github.com/pablof7z/tenex-edge/issues/207) | Deterministic status teardown | Status outliving dead sessions + stale `h`-tags |
| [#208](https://github.com/pablof7z/tenex-edge/issues/208) | Hook snapshot as derived node | Replaces the divergent hand-rolled `turn_start_audit` |
| [#209](https://github.com/pablof7z/tenex-edge/issues/209) | Equivalence oracle & characterization | `assert_incremental_equals_full` as a CI gate |
| [#210](https://github.com/pablof7z/tenex-edge/issues/210) | **Retrospective instrumentation** | `tenex-edge explain <handle>` + `llm_calls` ledger — your "what was fed to the LLM?" question |
